title: Exposure+Etched Create Style Interface
description: Change Exposure and Etched GUI to match the Create Style Interface resource pack
body:
Small addon for another resource pack [Create Style Interface](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/create-style-interface) that change GUI for [Exposure](https://modrinth.com/mod/exposure) and
[Etched](https://modrinth.com/mod/etched)
